quest_intro_1.text: Oh, {PLAYER}! I'm so glad you're here... I actually need your help with something.

quest_intro_2.text: I've been hiding some of my favorite items around the house, but I can't quite remember where I put them all.

quest_offer.text: Would you help me find them? Please?

choices.text: Of course! I love treasure hunts!

quest_decline.text: No worries at all. Come find me whenever you're ready!

quest_accept.text: Thank you so much! Let me show you where I last remember seeing them...

quest_showcase.text: Take a good look at each spot! Press Spacebar whenever you're ready to see the next one.

quest_post_showcase.text: Those are my most treasured items! They've scattered all around the house... please bring every last one back to me!

quest_end.text: I'll be right here waiting for you. Good luck, friend!

reward_start.text: You found them ALL?! Oh my goodness... I can't believe it! You are absolutely amazing!
